modes.label: Normal
modes.description: Standard operating mode with all approved loops enabled.

modes.label: Constrained
modes.description: Suppress experiments, noisy maintenance, and low-value proactive work until attention pressure clears.

modes.label: Degraded
modes.description: Block launches, promotions, and nonessential dispatch while core or domain incidents are active.

modes.label: Recovery Only
modes.description: Restrict activity to auth, restore, validation, and critical repair.
